subject: Fermi GBM Trigger 150815694 is not a GRB
body:
P. Jenke (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 461349522/150815694
at 16:38:38.71  UT on the 15th of August 2015, tentatively classified
as a GRB, is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to an accidental trigger."
